candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and matches Net sales values exactly; suitable as primary reported revenue line.
Also a direct top-line sales label; likely alternative presentation of revenue.
This is COGS, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label.
Also represents cost of sales, likely duplicate/total version of COGS.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the more specific non-total label first, with the total cost-of-revenues label as fallback.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component related to selling activities.
Clear SG&A overhead component related to administration.
Could be an overhead bucket in some years, but less clearly pure SG&A than selling/admin costs.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty, so selected from full preview. No explicit SG&A total row exists. Chose clear overhead component rows and included 'Other Operating Expense' as a possible additional overhead bucket for years where it is separately disclosed. Manual review recommended because selection required going outside the candidate list and 'Other Operating Expense' may include some non-SG&A items.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line on the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; should be excluded from XRD.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct income statement R&D expense line only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct interest expense line.
Broader finance-cost line; appropriate fallback if direct interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Narrow interest subcomponent, not the preferred overall interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest only; narrower than total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct interest expense line first, then broader financial expenses if needed, then lease-interest subcomponent as last fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interest, avoiding double counting with MIB.
Contains both parent equity and non-controlling interest, so less preferred for BE when a parent-only equity line exists.
Balancing row, not appropriate.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred candidate list missed the semantically correct owner/parent-only equity row that is present in the balance sheet preview. Selected this outside the candidate list to avoid double counting non-controlling interests in BE + MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent label for NCI on balance sheet.
Income statement allocation of profit to NCI, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not minority equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not minority interest.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as priority list; these represent minority interest equity and avoid using income statement profit-allocation rows.
